risk_form.comments: Bedbound patient. Heel protector briefly off during hygiene.

concern_output.label: stage_suspicion
concern_output.confidence_text: Pressure-injury probability is elevated and supported by the current risk context.
concern_output.note: Possible superficial pressure-injury pattern. This is a non-diagnostic stage suspicion for clinician review.

risk_form.comments: Bedbound patient. Heel protector briefly off during hygiene.

periwound_findings: sustained pressure risk from limited mobility
ai_estimated.exudate_estimate: no obvious heavy drainage signal; manual confirmation required

wound_metrics.depth_guidance: Depth is not inferable from a single 2D mobile photo. Use clinician-entered depth or a validated calibrated workflow.

prevention_checklist.title: Reposition and offload
prevention_checklist.description: Confirm a turning or offloading plan and reduce sustained pressure at the reported site.
prevention_checklist.rationale: Triggered by mobility limitation, nutrition risk, prior pressure injury, support surface already in use, formal risk score 10.

prevention_checklist.title: Nutrition review
prevention_checklist.description: Confirm intake status and consider dietitian review if clinically appropriate.
prevention_checklist.rationale: Nutrition risk was reported in the structured risk form.

prevention_checklist.title: Support surface optimization
prevention_checklist.description: Review mattress, heel protector, or seat support configuration for current risk level.
prevention_checklist.rationale: Escalated because risk remains moderate to high.

prevention_checklist.title: Focused skin review
prevention_checklist.description: Reassess the site with bedside exam, size estimate, and surrounding skin inspection.
prevention_checklist.rationale: AI output suggests a pressure-related concern that still requires clinician confirmation.

prevention_checklist.title: Retake standardized image if needed
prevention_checklist.description: Repeat the photo with better lighting, focus, and distance if the current image is not sufficient for documentation.

prevention_checklist.title: Document clinician review
prevention_checklist.description: Confirm the note, checklist, and image interpretation before export.
prevention_checklist.rationale: WoundWatch is documentation support only and not an autonomous diagnostic tool.

structured_note.summary: Bedside documentation support for Right heel. AI review suggested stage suspicion with moderate confidence. Pressure-injury concern probability 79%. Clinician review required.
structured_note.full_note: Reason for review: bedside wound documentation support after image capture of Right heel. Wound location: Right heel. AI concern summary: AI review suggested stage suspicion with moderate confidence. Pressure-injury concern probability 79%. Top class pressure injury at 79%. Possible superficial pressure-injury pattern. This is a non-diagnostic stage suspicion for clinician review. Depth guidance: depth is not inferable from a single 2D mobile photo and remains clinician-entered unless a validated calibrated workflow is used. Risk context: high overall pressure-injury risk. Signals noted: mobility limitation, nutrition risk, prior pressure injury, support surface already in use, formal risk score 10. Prevention bundle drafted: reposition and offload; nutrition review; support surface optimization; focused skin review; retake standardized image if needed. Comments: Bedbound patient. Heel protector briefly off during hygiene. Clinician review required prior to final documentation. Documentation support only. Not for autonomous diagnosis.
structured_note.copilot_statement: Documentation support only. Not for autonomous diagnosis.
